description_long: This is a rectangular medicine box labeled 'R-99', featuring a prominent red and yellow color scheme. The front displays a rooster logo, Khmer and English text, and images of green mangoes and flowering plants, suggesting an herbal or agricultural product. The sides of the box are red with the product name 'R-99' in large white letters, and one side includes a list of ingredients or instructions in Khmer. The back of the box is yellow with a table of information, likely dosage or usage instructions, and additional plant imagery at the bottom. The box appears to be made of cardboard and is designed to stand upright, with a sealed top and bottom. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and typical of over-the-counter herbal or agricultural medicines found in urban pharmacies or shops.
description: A rectangular cardboard medicine box labeled 'R-99' with red, yellow, and white colors, plant imagery, and detailed labeling in Khmer and English.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'R-99' label, rooster logo, plant images, and bilingual text.
description_view_1: Side view displays a solid red background with 'R-99' in white and a list of text in Khmer at the bottom.
description_view_2: Back view features a yellow background, a table of information, and plant imagery at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows 'R-99' in white on red and an image of green mangoes held in a hand.
